ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "stnumber" INTEGER /* Student number */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the faculty the student belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "date_enrolled" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the university */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual graduation date */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the student belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculties" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty */,
  "faculty_name" TEXT /* Name of the faculty */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the faculty operates under */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the faculty */,
  "dean_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dean of the faculty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculties_dean_id FOREIGN KEY ("dean_id") REFERENCES faculty_members ("faculty_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculties_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the faculty the department belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "head_of_department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the head of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_head_of_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("head_of_department_id") REFERENCES faculty_members ("faculty_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the faculty that offers the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisite courses */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolling in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, dropped) */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester of the enrollment */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the enrollment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment being graded */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade achieved by the student */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date the grade was awarded */,
  "grade_point" TEXT /* Grade point equivalent */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments on the grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty_members" (
  "faculty_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the faculty member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the faculty member */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the faculty the member belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the faculty member */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the faculty member */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the faculty member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the faculty member */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date the faculty member was hired */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the faculty member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_members_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "faculty_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member being assigned */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being assigned to */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date of assignment */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester of the assignment */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_assignments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_assignments_faculty_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_member_id") REFERENCES faculty_members ("faculty_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned a role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being assigned */,
  "role_start_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  "role_end_date" TEXT /* Date the role ends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic */,
  "analytic_name" TEXT /* Name of the analytic */,
  "analytic_date" TEXT /* Date the analytic was generated */,
  "analytic_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the analytic */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who generated the analytic */,
  "analytic_type" TEXT /* Type of the analytic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
